td.a: IMMZ.D18.S.Hib.2 doses with booster dose schedule

tr.td: IMMZ.D18.S.Hib.2 doses with booster dose schedule

div.p: IMMZ.D18.S.Hib.2 doses with booster dose schedule 2 primary doses with a booster dose (2p+1) schedule
WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

tr.td:
Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) dose 1: Provision of the Hib dose 1 Trigger event: Child's birth Trigger pseudo: Trigger date: "Date of birth" Create condition: Hib dose 1 should be provided if the client is older than 6 weeks
If:
Applicability:
Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) dose 1
(Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) dose 1)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) dose 1 Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

Hib dose 2: Provision of the Hib dose 2 Trigger event: First Hib dose from the primary series was administered to the client within 1 year of age. Client's age is less than 5 years Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Hib-containing vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 1 AND "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type"= "Hib-containing vaccines" and "Dose number" = 1) − "Date of birth" < 1 year AND Today's date − "Date of birth" ≤ 5 years Trigger date: "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Hib-containing vaccines") Create condition: Hib dose 2 should be provided if the client was given the previous dose more than 8 weeks ago
If:
Applicability:
Hib dose 2
(Hib dose 2)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Hib dose 2 Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

Hib booster dose: Provision of the Hib booster dose Trigger event: Second Hib dose from the primary series was administered. Client's age is less than 5 years Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Hib-containing vaccines" and "Type of dose"= "Primary series") = 2 AND Today's date − "Date of birth" ≤ 5 years Trigger date: Latest "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Hib-containing vaccines") Create condition: Hib booster dose should be provided if the client was given the previous dose more than 6 months ago
If:
Applicability:
Hib booster dose
(Hib booster dose)
Then: Definition: IMMZ.D2.DT.CR
Dynamic Values:
status: ('active')
payload.contentString: (Hib booster dose Create)
category.coding: (Code { system: 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/communication-category', code: 'alert' })
priority: (Code { system: 'http://hl7.org/fhir/request-priority', code: 'routine' })

valueString.value: Doses Administered to Patient
/** * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient */ define "Doses Administered to Patient": [Immunization] I where I.status = 'completed' and I.isSubpotent is not true
Doses Administered to Patient
/** * @dataElement All Doses Administered to Patient */ define "Doses Administered to Patient": Elements."Doses Administered to Patient" I where I.occurrence.toInterval() same day or before Today
Hib Doses Administered to Patient

/* @internal: Hib containing Doses Administered to Patient */ define "Hib Doses Administered to Patient": Encounter."Doses Administered to Patient" I where I.vaccineCode in Concepts."Hib-containing vaccines"
Hib Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
Number of Hib Primary Series Doses Administered
One Hib primary series dose was administered
First Hib dose from the primary series was administered
Date of First Hib Dose
Client's age was less than 1 year when first Hib dose was administered
Current Patient Age In Weeks
/** * @dataElement Patient age in weeks */ define "Current Patient Age In Weeks": AgeInWeeksAt(Today)
Current Patient Age In Years
/** * @dataElement Patient age in years */ define "Current Patient Age In Years": AgeInYearsAt(Today)
Client's age is between 6 weeks and 5 years
Two Hib primary series doses were administered
Second Hib dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed
Hib dose 2 Expiration
Hib dose 2
Date of Latest Hib Dose
Hib dose 2 Due Date
Hib dose 2 Create
No Hib primary series doses were administered
Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) dose 1 Expiration
Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) dose 1
Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) dose 1 Due Date
Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) dose 1 Create
Hib Booster Series Doses Administered to Patient
Number of Hib Booster Series Doses Administered
One Hib booster dose was administered
One Hib booster dose was administered. Hib immunization schedule has been completed
Hib booster dose Expiration
Hib booster dose
Hib booster dose Due Date
Hib booster dose Create

/** * @description: Gets the doses from the primary series */ define fluent function seriesPrimary(immunizations List<Immunization>): immunizations I where exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Primary series' )
define function ToString(value string): value.value
define function ToString(value ImmunizationStatus): value.value
define function ToBoolean(value boolean): value.value
define function ToConcept(concept FHIR.CodeableConcept): if concept is null then null else System.Concept { codes: concept.coding C return ToCode(C), display: concept.text.value }

define function ToCode(coding FHIR.Coding): if coding is null then null else System.Code { code: coding.code.value, system: coding.system.value, version: coding.version.value, display: coding.display.value }
define fluent function earliest(immunizations List<Immunization>): First( immunizations I sort by start of occurrence.toInterval() )
define function ToDate(value date): value.value
define fluent function mostRecent(immunizations List<Immunization>): Last( immunizations I sort by start of occurrence.toInterval() )

/** * @description: Gets the doses from the Booster series */ define fluent function seriesBooster(immunizations List<Immunization>): immunizations I where exists( I.protocolApplied pa where pa.series = 'Booster dose' )

name.value: Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) dose 1 Create

title.value: IMMZ.D18.S.Hib.2 doses with booster dose schedule

description.value: IMMZ.D18.S.Hib.2 doses with booster dose schedule 2 primary doses with a booster dose (2p+1) schedule

citation.value: WHO recommendations for routine immunization - summary tables (January 2025)

description.value: Provision of the Hib dose 1 Trigger event: Child's birth Trigger pseudo: Trigger date: "Date of birth" Create condition: Hib dose 1 should be provided if the client is older than 6 weeks

expression.value: Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib) dose 1 Create

description.value: Provision of the Hib dose 2 Trigger event: First Hib dose from the primary series was administered to the client within 1 year of age. Client's age is less than 5 years Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Hib-containing vaccines" and "Type of dose" = "Primary series") = 1 AND "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type"= "Hib-containing vaccines" and "Dose number" = 1) − "Date of birth" < 1 year AND Today's date − "Date of birth" ≤ 5 years Trigger date: "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Hib-containing vaccines") Create condition: Hib dose 2 should be provided if the client was given the previous dose more than 8 weeks ago

Provision of the Hib booster dose Trigger event: Second Hib dose from the primary series was administered. Client's age is less than 5 years Trigger pseudo: Count of vaccines administered (where "Vaccine type" = "Hib-containing vaccines" and "Type of dose"= "Primary series") = 2 AND Today's date − "Date of birth" ≤ 5 years Trigger date: Latest "Date and time of vaccination" (where "Vaccine type" = "Hib-containing vaccines") Create condition: Hib booster dose should be provided if the client was given the previous dose more than 6 months ago
